title: Umami Slovakian Broccoli Stir-fry
description: This sugar-free-friendly brunch-mood Slovakian dish features tender stir-fried broccoli and vegetables for a healthy and tasty meal.

ingredients.name: Spring onions (scallions)
ingredients.notes: white and green parts separated, green part finely chopped for color contrast

instructions: Wash and cut the broccoli into small pieces.
Prepare spring onions by separating white and green parts, chopping the green part finely for color contrast.
Heat oil in a wok or frying pan over medium-high heat. Add chopped spring onion whites first, followed by minced garlic and chili flakes (if using).
Once the mixture is fragrant, add broccoli florets to the pan. Season with salt as needed.
Cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 5-7 minutes.
Sprinkle sesame seeds on top of the dish for a crunchy touch and garnish if desired.
